name: Crockpot Neopolitan Tostada
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine turkey, eggplant, salsa, tomato paste, parsley, chili powder, cumin, oregano, and corn in slow cooker.
2. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 6 hours.
3. Stir with a fork to break up large chunks of turkey.
4. Spoon about 3/4 cup cooked turkey mixture onto each pita half.
5. Top with yogurt, lettuce, olives, and cheese, if desired.
